alternatives: Forbid every conditional in a View
Allow each rendering adapter to format raw values and derive product meaning
consequences: Presentation mapping is testable without rendering UI
UIKit and SwiftUI consume equivalent semantic state
Views may retain transient UX-local state without owning product decisions
context: UIKit and SwiftUI need one testable presentation boundary that preserves humble Views without prohibiting legitimate rendering mechanics.
decision: Use unidirectional VIP with Presenter-prepared display-ready state; Views render, forward typed intent, and own only UX-local or geometry-only values.
migration: Move formatting and product decisions to the Presenter or presentation mapper, introduce display-ready state, and retain only UX-local View state.
title: VIP presentation flow
verification_impact: The final joined AI consistency review confirms the humble-View boundary and UIKit/SwiftUI semantic parity across Canon, Skills, and guidance.
